Services Compliance Contacts
NIST 800-88 Rev 1

Certified Data Erasure

Forensic-Grade Security. Military-grade data destruction with forensic verification and complete audit trail for secure hard drive destruction and IT asset disposal.

Process Flow

1

Asset Registration

Unique ID, photograph, condition log

2

Secure Transport

Sealed containers, GPS tracking, dual-custody

3

Certified Wiping

ADISA L2 and Common Criteria EAL3+ certified data erasure. NIST 800-88 and IEEE 2883-2022 compliant processing.

4

Forensic Verification

Boot-level scan, unrecoverable confirmation

5

Documentation

Certificate of Destruction, audit trail, video log (optional)

Standards & Compliance

🛡️

Security-First Approach

Multi-layered verification beyond industry baseline

🏛️

Government-Grade Standards

Procedures aligned with national security protocols

✅

Certified Data Destruction

Forensically unrecoverable, legally defensible

📋

ADISA L2 Certified | Common Criteria EAL3+ | NIST 800-88 & IEEE 2883-2022 Compliant

Full compliance with guidelines for Media Sanitization

Environmental Impact

♻️

100% Material Recovery

From destroyed storage devices

💎

Rare Earth Element Reclamation

Neodymium, cobalt, lithium

🌳

Zero Landfill

Data-bearing waste to landfill
